>2g MAJOR (3× outlier)
Dims: ≤1mm MINOR
>1mm MAJOR (2.2× outlier)

span.p:
polling_rate, dpi:
max value must match
any diff → MAJOR

span.p:
sensor: 2+ token overlap
OR perf token match
Categorical (10):
exact match → MAJOR

by field|expected|actual

+ no-anchor 0.10
